allow: PowerShell(python -c "import yfinance, pandas, numpy; print\(yfinance.__version__, pandas.__version__, numpy.__version__\)")

PowerShell($s = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet -WakeToRun -StartWhenAvailable -AllowStartIfOnBatteries -DontStopIfGoingOnBatteries; Set-ScheduledTask -TaskName "MultiProductDaily" -Settings $s | Out-Null; $t = Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName "MultiProductDaily"; "{0} | WakeToRun={1} StartWhenAvailable={2}" -f $t.TaskName, $t.Settings.WakeToRun, $t.Settings.StartWhenAvailable)
